name: manual
allowed_solo_decisions: summarize request; ask for clarification; no routing decision
forbidden_always: publish data; commit; push; deploy; install dependencies; destructive actions; promote lessons automatically

name: suggest
allowed_solo_decisions: suggest route; suggest package; identify gates
forbidden_always: publish data; commit; push; deploy; install dependencies; destructive actions; promote lessons automatically

name: route-readonly
allowed_solo_decisions: choose read-only route; create minimal package; choose validation command; record sanitized problem/solution rows
requires_human: specialist execution; writes outside memory/knowledge and memory/agents logs
forbidden_always: publish data; commit; push; deploy; install dependencies; destructive actions; promote lessons automatically

name: route-local
allowed_solo_decisions: choose read-only route; choose semi-autonomous local agent when registry gates match; record sanitized learning/problem/solution rows
requires_human: any file write outside allowed agent contract; promotion of policy
forbidden_always: publish data; commit; push; deploy; install dependencies; destructive actions; promote lessons automatically

name: propose-policy
allowed_solo_decisions: all C3 decisions; propose policy promotion with evidence bundle
requires_human: applying policy promotion; changing gates; changing autonomy level
forbidden_always: publish data; commit; push; deploy; install dependencies; destructive actions; promote lessons automatically
